---
title: "dbsql baru"
author: "Jasmin Nur Hanifa - M0501241060"
date: "2025-02-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Install package yang diperlukan
install.packages(c("DBI", "RMySQL", "glue")) 
library(DBI)
library(RMySQL)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(glue)

```

```{r}
# 1. Konfigurasi Database DBngin
db_config <- list(
  host = "127.0.0.1",
   port = 3309,          # Port MySQL di DBngin
   user = "root",
   password = "",
   dbname = "rotten_story"    # Nama database yang akan dibuat
 )

```


```{r}
# 2. Membuat koneksi ke MySQL server (tanpa database spesifik)
con <- dbConnect(
  MySQL(),
  host = db_config$host,
  port = db_config$port,
  user = db_config$user,
  password = db_config$password,
  dbname = db_config$dbname,
  local_infile = TRUE
 )

#3. Membuat database jika belum ada
tryCatch({
  dbExecute(con, glue("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_config$dbname}"))
  message("Database ", db_config$dbname, " berhasil dibuat/ditemukan")
 }, error = function(e) {
  message("Gagal membuat database: ", e$message)
 })
```

## Panggil Dataset

```{r}
novel <- read.csv("D:\\S2\\MDS\\Praktikum\\Project-mds-klp3\\Dataset 3\\novel.csv")
penulis <- read.csv("D:\\S2\\MDS\\Praktikum\\Project-mds-klp3\\Dataset 3\\penulis.csv")
penerbit <- read.csv("D:\\S2\\MDS\\Praktikum\\Project-mds-klp3\\Dataset 3\\penerbit.csv")
ulasan <- read.csv("D:\\S2\\MDS\\Praktikum\\Project-mds-klp3\\Dataset 3\\ulasan.csv")
genre <- read.csv("D:\\S2\\MDS\\Praktikum\\Project-mds-klp3\\Dataset 3\\genre.csv")
novel_genre <- read.csv("D:\\S2\\MDS\\Praktikum\\Project-mds-klp3\\Dataset 3\\novel_genre.csv")
```


```{r}
dbExecute(con, "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS rotten_story")
```

```{r}
# Create and select the database
dbExecute(con, paste("CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS", db_config$dbname))
dbExecute(con, paste("USE", db_config$dbname))
dbExecute(con, "SET GLOBAL local_infile = TRUE;")

# 3.1 Tabel dasar tanpa foreign key
dbWriteTable(con, "penulis", penulis, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(con, "penerbit", penerbit, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(con, "genre", genre, overwrite = TRUE)

# 3.2 Tabel yang bergantung pada tabel dasar
dbWriteTable(con, "ulasan", ulasan, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(con, "novel", novel, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(con, "novel_genre", novel_genre, overwrite = TRUE)
```

```{r}
dbGetQuery(con, "DESCRIBE novel")
dbGetQuery(con, "DESCRIBE penulis")
dbGetQuery(con, "DESCRIBE penerbit")
dbGetQuery(con, "DESCRIBE ulasan")
dbGetQuery(con, "DESCRIBE genre")
dbGetQuery(con, "DESCRIBE novel_genre")
```


```{r}
# 4. Membuat indeks dan constraint foreign key
# (Di MySQL, foreign key harus dibuat manual melalui query)
query <- "
ALTER TABLE novel
ADD FOREIGN KEY (id_penulis) REFERENCES penulis(id_penulis),
ADD FOREIGN KEY (id_penerbit) REFERENCES penerbit(id_penerbit),


ALTER TABLE ulasan
ADD FOREIGN KEY (id_novel) REFERENCES novel(id_novel),

ALTER TABLE novel_genre
ADD FOREIGN KEY (id_novel) REFERENCES novel(id_novel),
ADD FOREIGN KEY (id_genre) REFERENCES novel(id_genre),
"

# Execute the column modifications
for(q in strsplit(alter_columns_query, ";")[[1]]) {
  if(nchar(q) > 5) dbSendQuery(con, q)
}


```

```{r}
alter_columns_query <- "
ALTER TABLE novel 
MODIFY id_novel CHAR(10),
MODIFY id_penulis CHAR(10),
MODIFY id_penerbit CHAR(10);

ALTER TABLE ulasan 
MODIFY id_novel CHAR(10);

ALTER TABLE novel_genre 
MODIFY id_novel CHAR(10),
MODIFY id_genre CHAR(10);


"

# Eksekusi perubahan tipe data
for(q in strsplit(alter_columns_query, ";")[[1]]) {
  if(nchar(q) > 5) dbExecute(con, q)
}

```


```{r}
# 5. Verifikasi tabel
dbListTables(con)
```

```{r}
# 5. Analisis struktur database
tryCatch({
  # Buka koneksi ke database spesifik
  con_db <- dbConnect(
    MySQL(),
    host = db_config$host,
    port = db_config$port,
    user = db_config$user,
    password = db_config$password,
    dbname = db_config$dbname
  )
  
  # Function untuk mendapatkan detail struktur tabel
  get_table_structure <- function(table_name) {
    structure <- dbGetQuery(con_db, paste("DESCRIBE", table_name))
    foreign_keys <- dbGetQuery(con_db, sprintf("
      SELECT 
        COLUMN_NAME,
        REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME,
        REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME
      FROM
        INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
      WHERE
        TABLE_SCHEMA = '%s'
        AND TABLE_NAME = '%s'
        AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL
    ", db_config$dbname, table_name))
    
    list(
      structure = structure,
      foreign_keys = foreign_keys
    )
  }
  
  # Dapatkan semua tabel
  tables <- dbGetQuery(con_db, "SHOW TABLES")
  table_names <- tables[[1]]
  
  # Print detailed database structure
  message("\n=== STRUKTUR DATABASE ===\n")
  for (table_name in table_names) {
    message("\nTABEL: ", table_name)
    structure <- get_table_structure(table_name)
    
    message("\nKolom:")
    print(structure$structure)
    
    if (nrow(structure$foreign_keys) > 0) {
      message("\nForeign Keys:")
      print(structure$foreign_keys)
    }
    
    # Get row count
    row_count <- dbGetQuery(con_db, sprintf("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM %s", table_name))
    message("\nJumlah baris: ", row_count$count)
    
    # Get sample data
    if(row_count$count > 0) {
      sample_data <- dbGetQuery(con_db, sprintf("SELECT * FROM %s LIMIT 3", table_name))
      message("\nContoh Data:")
      print(sample_data)
    }
    
    message("\n", paste(rep("-", 50), collapse=""))
  }
  
  # Generate database statistics
  message("\n=== STATISTIK DATABASE ===\n")
  for (table_name in table_names) {
    count <- dbGetQuery(con_db, sprintf("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM %s", table_name))
    message(sprintf("%s: %d records", table_name, count$count))
  }
  
}, error = function(e) {
  message("Error: ", e$message)
}, finally = {
  dbDisconnect(con_db)
  message("\nKoneksi database ditutup")
})
```

```{r}
# Visualisasi ERD dengan DiagrammeR
if (!require("DiagrammeR")) install.packages("DiagrammeR")
library(DiagrammeR)

# Buat koneksi baru
con_db <- dbConnect(
  MySQL(),
  host = db_config$host,
  port = db_config$port,
  user = db_config$user,
  password = db_config$password,
  dbname = db_config$dbname
)

# Dapatkan semua tabel
tables <- dbGetQuery(con_db, "SHOW TABLES")
table_names <- tables[[1]]

# Buat query untuk mendapatkan relasi antar tabel
relations_query <- sprintf("
  SELECT 
    TABLE_NAME,
    COLUMN_NAME,
    REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME,
    REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME
  FROM
    INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
  WHERE
    TABLE_SCHEMA = '%s'
    AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL
", db_config$dbname)

# Dapatkan relasi
relations <- dbGetQuery(con_db, relations_query)

# Buat diagram menggunakan DiagrammeR
nodes <- create_node_df(
  n = length(table_names),
  label = table_names
)

edges <- create_edge_df(
  from = match(relations$TABLE_NAME, table_names),
  to = match(relations$REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, table_names),
  rel = "references"
)

graph <- create_graph(nodes_df = nodes, edges_df = edges)
render_graph(graph)

# Tutup koneksi
dbDisconnect(con_db)
```
